prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A clean Cartesian graph centred on the frame: x-axis labelled "Time (s)" with tick marks at 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6; y-axis labelled "Position (m)" with tick marks at 0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100, 120. The grid is rendered in soft dark-grey lines on the dark background. Seven small glowing orange dots are plotted at (0, 0), (1, 20), (2, 40), (3, 60), (4, 80), (5, 100), (6, 120). All seven dots fall exactly on a straight line that rises from lower-left to upper-right at a 45-degree angle, drawn in solid bright orange. Two small dashed grey lines drop from the (3, 60) dot down to the x-axis and across to the y-axis, illustrating how to read the coordinates. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels, thin orange leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and lines, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A position-time graph with time on the x-axis and position on the y-axis. Seven dots are plotted in a straight line from (0, 0) to (6, 120) and connected by a single straight orange line.

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background, split into three equal panels side by side. Each panel contains a small Cartesian graph with x-axis labelled "Time" and y-axis labelled "Position", drawn on a soft dark grid. Panel 1 (left), titled "Constant velocity": a single straight orange line rising from lower-left to upper-right at 45 degrees. Panel 2 (middle), titled "Accelerating (speeding up)": a single orange curve starting flat at the lower left and bending upward to become steep at the upper right (concave-up curve). Panel 3 (right), titled "At rest": a single horizontal orange line halfway up the graph, parallel to the x-axis. All three panel titles in clean sans-serif at the bottom of each panel. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent lines and labels, clean technical illustration style.
alt: Three position-time graphs side by side: a straight rising line labelled constant velocity, a curve that gets steeper labelled accelerating, and a horizontal line labelled at rest

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A single Cartesian graph centred in the frame: x-axis labelled "Time (s)" with tick marks 0 to 6, y-axis labelled "Position (m)" with tick marks 0 to 120. A straight orange line rises from the origin to (6, 120). Two points are marked clearly along the line: A at (2, 40) and B at (4, 80), each as a small filled orange circle with a label letter. A right-angle triangle is drawn with thin dashed orange lines: a horizontal dashed segment from A rightward to a corner labelled C at (4, 40), and a vertical dashed segment from C up to B at (4, 80). Beside the horizontal leg, label "AC = 2 s". Beside the vertical leg, label "BC = 40 m". To the right of the triangle, an annotation: "slope = BC / AC = 40/2 = 20 m/s". Soft dark grid lines. Clean digital illustration. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent labels and lines, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A position-time graph showing a straight rising line with two points A and B marked, and a right triangle ABC drawn beneath the line illustrating BC over AC as the slope

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A glowing line graph floating in deep dark space — clean orange line rising from lower-left origin diagonally upward to upper-right. Beneath this line, a softly glowing translucent orange triangular region — clearly the area under the line — pulses gently with light, hinting that this region is itself meaningful. Subtle dark grid lines in the background; faint stars in the deep indigo void. The entire image suggests two ideas at once: a line whose steepness matters, and an area beneath it whose magnitude matters too. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric. Dark background, glowing orange and warm-amber accents, no text overlay.
alt: A clean velocity-time line graph rising from origin and a glowing orange shaded triangle beneath it suggesting that the area below the line carries hidden meaning

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background, split into three equal panels side by side. Each panel contains a small Cartesian graph with x-axis labelled "Time (s)" and y-axis labelled "Velocity (m/s)", drawn on a soft dark grid. Panel 1 (left), titled "Constant velocity": a horizontal orange line at y = 20 m/s extending across the whole x-range. Panel 2 (middle), titled "Speeding up at constant rate": an orange straight line rising from origin (0, 0) up to (30 s, 15 m/s) at 45 degrees. Panel 3 (right), titled "Slowing down at constant rate": an orange straight line falling from (0, 15 m/s) down to (30 s, 0). Panel titles below each panel in clean sans-serif. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent lines and labels, clean technical illustration style.
alt: Three velocity-time graphs side by side: a horizontal line at constant 20 m/s, a rising straight line from 0 to 15 m/s, and a falling straight line from 15 to 0 m/s

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A single Cartesian graph: x-axis labelled "Time (s)" with tick marks at 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30; y-axis labelled "Velocity (m/s)" with tick marks at 0, 5, 10, 15. A clean orange straight line rises from origin (0, 0) up to (30, 15). Between the vertical lines at t = 10 s and t = 20 s, the area beneath the orange line is divided into two filled regions: a translucent green-orange rectangle from (10, 0) to (20, 5) labelled "Rectangle: 5 × 10 = 50 m", and a translucent darker-orange triangle on top of the rectangle bounded by the line, labelled "Triangle: ½ × 10 × 5 = 25 m". A small annotation to the right reads "Total displacement = 75 m". Soft dark grid lines. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and warm-green accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A velocity-time graph showing a straight line rising from (0, 0) to (30, 15), with the region between t=10s and t=20s shaded and split into a rectangle and a triangle to compute displacement

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). Three glowing physics equations float in deep dark space, arranged in a horizontal row: "v = u + at", "s = ut + ½at²", "v² = u² + 2as". Each equation is rendered in clean glowing orange typography. Behind them, a faint web of dashed orange lines connects all three, hinting that they share a single underlying principle. The deep indigo background is studded with faint stars and a soft nebular glow. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric. Dark background, glowing orange equation glyphs, no additional text overlay.
alt: Three glowing physics equations floating in dark space, connected by faint orange lines suggesting they share a single common origin

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A single Cartesian graph with the x-axis labelled "Time" and the y-axis labelled "Velocity". A clean orange straight line rises from the point (0, u) on the y-axis up to the point (t, v) at the upper right. The point (0, u) is labelled "A", the point (t, v) is labelled "B". Drop a vertical dashed line from B straight down to the x-axis at t — call this foot "D". From A, extend a horizontal dashed line rightward to meet the vertical line at a point "C" at height u. The shape OABD beneath the line is split visibly into two regions: a translucent green rectangle OACD with height u and width t (labelled "Rectangle = u × t"), and a translucent orange triangle ACB on top of it (labelled "Triangle = ½ × t × (v − u)"). Soft dark grid lines. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and warm-green accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A velocity-time graph showing a straight line rising from initial velocity u at t=0 to final velocity v at time t, with the area beneath split into a rectangle of height u and a triangle on top

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A wet Indian national highway at night, viewed from a low elevated angle. In the foreground, a red Indian sedan brakes hard — its rear brake lights blazing intensely red, bright reflections smearing on the wet road behind it, a streak of motion-blur from its tyres. Just ahead of it, dangerously close, a yellow truck sits with hazard lights on. The gap between them is alarmingly small. Mist hangs in the distance; faint yellow streetlights line the highway. Painterly cinematic illustration, dramatic, tense — captures the lived reality of a near-collision. Dark background, glowing red brake-light and amber streetlight accents, no text overlay.
alt: Two cars on a dark wet highway at night, one braking sharply with red brake lights blazing, the gap between them dangerously small

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A horizontal scene viewed from the side: a road stretches across the frame, lit by a single overhead orange streetlight. Three positions of the same red Indian sedan are shown along the road, marking three moments in time. Above the road, a horizontal scale bar runs across with two distinct segments. Segment 1 (left) is labelled "Thinking distance (during reaction time)" with an annotation "car still at full speed". Segment 2 (right) is labelled "Braking distance (under brakes)" with an annotation "car decelerating". A bracket spans both segments at the bottom labelled "Total stopping distance". The car at the leftmost position has no brake lights; the car in the middle (start of braking) has just turned on red brake lights; the car at the rightmost position is fully stopped, brake lights still on. The scene background is dark with a faint mist. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin orange leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange and red brake-light accents, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A horizontal diagram showing a car with two distance segments labelled — thinking distance during reaction time, then braking distance during deceleration, totalling the stopping distance

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). Earth seen as a deep-blue marble in the lower right of the frame, with the Moon shown circling above and to the left. A glowing orange curved orbital trail traces the Moon's circular path around the Earth. At three or four points along this orbit, small luminous orange arrows shoot off tangentially — outward and forward, perpendicular to the radius — hinting at the velocity at each point. Deep dark space studded with stars and a faint nebular glow in the background. Painterly cinematic illustration, atmospheric and contemplative. Dark cosmic background, glowing orange and warm amber accents, no text overlay.
alt: A bright moon orbiting Earth at twilight, with a glowing curved orange trail tracing the orbit and faint tangent arrows at multiple points along the path

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A clean circle drawn in soft white in the middle of the frame, representing a top-down view of a merry-go-round of radius R. A small stylised child figure sits on the rim of the circle at one position labelled "Start". A bold orange curved arrow follows the rim from "Start" approximately three-quarters of the way around to a second position labelled "Now" — illustrating the path travelled (distance). A straight orange dashed chord is drawn from "Start" directly across to "Now" — illustrating the displacement. Both are labelled: the curved arrow as "Distance covered (along arc)", the chord as "Displacement (straight line)". Below the circle, a brief annotation: "For one full loop: distance = 2πR, displacement = 0". A faint star-field background. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin orange leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), orange accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A circular path with a child seated on it at one point, an arc traced from her starting position to her current position, and a straight chord drawn between them

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background. A clean white circle drawn in the centre of the frame, with a small dark-red ball shown at four equally spaced positions around the rim — top, right, bottom, and left. At each ball position, a bold green arrow of *equal length* is drawn pointing in the direction of motion at that point — meaning each arrow is tangent to the circle at its location, pointing in the same rotational sense (e.g., counter-clockwise: arrow at top points left, arrow at right points up, arrow at bottom points right, arrow at left points down). All four arrows are labelled "v" indicating the velocity vector. A small annotation below the circle reads: "Same speed (arrow length) at every point. Different direction at every point." Faint dark grid background. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), green and orange accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A circle with a small ball shown at four positions around its rim, each with a green velocity arrow pointing along the tangent in the direction of motion

prompt: NCERT Class 9 textbook illustration on a dark background, split into two side-by-side panels. Panel 1 (left), labelled "Ring in place": top-down view of a flat tape ring on a wooden table surface. Inside the ring, a small bright-red marble is shown with a curved orange dashed trail tracing its path along the inner wall of the ring, indicating circular motion. Panel 2 (right), labelled "Ring lifted": same view, but now the ring is shown being lifted up out of the frame at the top (a thin line indicating it has been removed), and the same red marble is shown shooting off the table in a straight bold orange dashed line — clearly tangent to the circle where the ring used to be. The straight escape line continues off-frame. Dark wood-grain table textured surface, faint subtle highlights from a single overhead light. Clean digital illustration, integrated sans-serif labels with thin leader lines. Dark background (#0a0a0a or near-black), warm-red and orange accent colours, clean technical illustration style.
alt: A flat ring on a table with a marble rolling inside it on the left, and on the right, the same marble shown shooting off in a straight tangent line after the ring has been removed
